headline: Packaging Corp Ready to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: PKG heads into Q1 results with strong revenue growth expectations, but earnings estimates fall and our model signals no beat.

headline: Is Packaging Corporation of America (PKG) Pricing Looked At Differently After Recent Share Gains
summary: Wondering if Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) is still fairly priced at around US$213 per share, or if the current tag leaves some value on the table, this breakdown is for you. PKG shares last closed at US$213.39, with returns of 1.4% over the past week, 5.3% over the past month, 1.1% year to date, and 20.1% over the past year, which gives you a sense of how the market has been reassessing the stock. Recent coverage has kept attention on PKG as investors weigh how its position...
